ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sales were made */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sales */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales amount */,
  "day_of_week" INTEGER /* Day of the week (1-7) when the sales were made */,
  "promo" INTEGER /* Promotional activity indicator (0/1) */,
  "school_holiday" INTEGER /* School holiday indicator (0/1) */,
  "store_type" INTEGER /* Type of store (e.g., 0, 1, 2) */,
  "assortment" INTEGER /* Assortment level of the store (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Customer segment (e.g., youth, adult, senior) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., cash, credit card, digital wallet) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the sale */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Time of the transaction */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition on the day of the sale */,
  "customer_age_range" TEXT /* Customer age range (e.g., 18-25, 26-35) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_type" INTEGER /* Type of store (e.g., 0, 1, 2) */,
  "assortment" INTEGER /* Assortment level of the store (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "competition_distance" REAL /* Distance to the nearest competitor */,
  "competition_open_since_month" INTEGER /* Month when the nearest competitor opened */,
  "competition_open_since_year" INTEGER /* Year when the nearest competitor opened */,
  "store_address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the store */,
  "store_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of customers the store can handle at once */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the store location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the store location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotional activity */,
  "promo_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotional activity */,
  "promo_type" TEXT /* Type of promotional activity */,
  "promo_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotional activity */,
  "promo_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotional activity */,
  "promo_effect" REAL /* Impact of the promotional activity on sales */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the promotion is active */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the promotion */,
  "target_sales_increase" REAL /* Expected increase in sales due to the promotion */,
  "actual_sales_increase" REAL /* Actual increase in sales due to the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "holiday_type" TEXT /* Type of holiday (e.g., school, state, federal) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store impacted by the holiday */,
  "expected_sales_impact" REAL /* Expected impact on sales due to the holiday */,
  "actual_sales_impact" REAL /* Actual impact on sales due to the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holidays_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_forecast" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store for which the forecast is made */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecasted_sales" REAL /* Forecasted sales amount */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for the forecast (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the forecast */,
  "forecast_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_forecast_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales analyst, marketing manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User's specific permissions (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store located in the region */,
  "region_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region manager */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_region_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor */,
  "competitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the competitor */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store closest to the competitor */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the competitor and the store */,
  "competitor_opening_date" TEXT /* Date the competitor opened */,
  "competitor_closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the competitor */,
  "competitor_sales" REAL /* Estimated sales of the competitor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitors_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store for which the data is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
